'''ngowazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitless|rabbitless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitless|rabbitless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngowazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowazithi|ngowazithi]] || [[word:ngowaziji|ngowaziji]] || [[word:ngowazishi|ngowazishi]] || [[word:ngowaziki|ngowaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowazuthuthu|ngowazuthuthu]] || [[word:ngowazujuju|ngowazujuju]] || [[word:ngowazushushu|ngowazushushu]] || [[word:ngowazukuku|ngowazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowazuthu|ngowazuthu]] || [[word:ngowazuju|ngowazuju]] || [[word:ngowazushu|ngowazushu]] || [[word:ngowazuku|ngowazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowazufthuf|ngowazufthuf]] || [[word:ngowazufjuf|ngowazufjuf]] || [[word:ngowazufshuf|ngowazufshuf]] || [[word:ngowazufkuf|ngowazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowazethe|ngowazethe]] || [[word:ngowazeje|ngowazeje]] || [[word:ngowazeshe|ngowazeshe]] || [[word:ngowazeke|ngowazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowazothotho|ngowazothotho]] || [[word:ngowazojojo|ngowazojojo]] || [[word:ngowazoshosho|ngowazoshosho]] || [[word:ngowazokoko|ngowazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowazotho|ngowazotho]] || [[word:ngowazojo|ngowazojo]] || [[word:ngowazosho|ngowazosho]] || [[word:ngowazoko|ngowazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowazofthof|ngowazofthof]] || [[word:ngowazofjof|ngowazofjof]] || [[word:ngowazofshof|ngowazofshof]] || [[word:ngowazofkof|ngowazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowazïfthïf|ngowazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfjïf|ngowazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfshïf|ngowazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfkïf|ngowazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowazïfthïfthïf|ngowazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfjïfjïf|ngowazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfshïfshïf|ngowazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfkïfkïf|ngowazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowazïfthïf|ngowazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfjïf|ngowazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfshïf|ngowazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfkïf|ngowazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowazïfthïf|ngowazïfthïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfjïf|ngowazïfjïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfshïf|ngowazïfshïf]] || [[word:ngowazïfkïf|ngowazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngowazæthæ|ngowazæthæ]] || [[word:ngowazæjæ|ngowazæjæ]] || [[word:ngowazæshæ|ngowazæshæ]] || [[word:ngowazækæ|ngowazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngowazathatha|ngowazathatha]] || [[word:ngowazajaja|ngowazajaja]] || [[word:ngowazashasha|ngowazashasha]] || [[word:ngowazakaka|ngowazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngowazatha|ngowazatha]] || [[word:ngowazaja|ngowazaja]] || [[word:ngowazasha|ngowazasha]] || [[word:ngowazaka|ngowazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngowazafthaf|ngowazafthaf]] || [[word:ngowazafjaf|ngowazafjaf]] || [[word:ngowazafshaf|ngowazafshaf]] || [[word:ngowazafkaf|ngowazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngowazasha|ngowazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowazshësha|ngowazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowazrosha|ngowazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowazmusha|ngowazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowazyasha|ngowazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowaznkshësha|gongowaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowaznkrosha|gongowaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowaznkmusha|gongowaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowaznkyasha|gongowaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngowawazasha|ngowawazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowawazshësha|ngowawazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowawazrosha|ngowawazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowawazmusha|ngowawazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowawazyasha|ngowawazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowawaznkshësha|gongowawaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowawaznkrosha|gongowawaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowawaznkmusha|gongowawaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowawaznkyasha|gongowawaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngewæzasha|ngewæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngewæzshësha|ngewæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngewæzrosha|ngewæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngewæzmusha|ngewæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngewæzyasha|ngewæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongewæznkshësha|gongewæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongewæznkrosha|gongewæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongewæznkmusha|gongewæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongewæznkyasha|gongewæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngowfazasha|ngowfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngowfazshësha|ngowfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngowfazrosha|ngowfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngowfazmusha|ngowfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngowfazyasha|ngowfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongowfaznkshësha|gongowfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongowfaznkrosha|gongowfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongowfaznkmusha|gongowfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongowfaznkyasha|gongowfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
